mapper.insert:
SELECT PROJECTNOTICE_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO projectnotice( noticenum, projectid, subject, content, hitcount, regdate, isnotice, state, authorempid ) VALUES( #{noticenum}, #{projectid, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{subject}, #{content}, 0, SYSDATE, #{isnotice}, 1, #{authorempid} )
mapper.update: UPDATE projectnotice SET subject = #{subject}, content = #{content}, isnotice = #{isnotice}, updatedate = SYSDATE WHERE noticenum = #{noticenum}
UPDATE projectnotice SET state = 0 WHERE noticenum = #{noticenum}
UPDATE projectnotice SET hitcount = hitcount + 1 WHERE noticenum = #{noticenum}
mapper.select:
SELECT n.noticenum, n.projectid, n.subject, n.hitcount, n.isnotice, n.state, TO_CHAR(n.regdate,'YYYY-MM-DD') regdate, TO_CHAR(n.updatedate,'YYYY-MM-DD') updatedate, n.authorempid, e.name authorName
FROM projectnotice n LEFT JOIN employee2 e ON n.authorempid = e.empid
WHERE n.state = 1
ORDER BY n.isnotice DESC, n.noticenum DESC
OFFSET #{offset, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ROWS ONLY

SELECT ep.projectid, p.title projectname, ep.role
FROM empproject ep JOIN project p ON ep.projectid = p.projectid
WHERE ep.empid = #{empId} ORDER BY p.title
mapper.insert:
SELECT PROJECTNOTICEFILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO projectnoticefile( filenum, savefilename, originalfilename, filesize, noticenum ) VALUES( #{filenum}, #{savefilename}, #{originalfilename}, #{filesize}, #{noticenum} )
mapper.select: SELECT filenum, savefilename, originalfilename, filesize, noticenum FROM projectnoticefile WHERE noticenum = #{noticenum} ORDER BY filenum
SELECT filenum, savefilename, originalfilename, filesize, noticenum FROM projectnoticefile WHERE filenum = #{filenum}
